intro: Graellsia hederifolia, also known as Spanish false hellebore or false hellebore, is a plant species belonging to the family Melanthiaceae. The health benefits of Graellsia hederifolia include its potential to exhibit anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, making it useful in the treatment of various health conditions. The bioactive constituents of this plant include glycosides, alkaloids, and flavonoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
